title: ctenopteris burbidgei
intro: Ctenopteris burbidgei is a species of fern native to Australia, specifically found in Queensland and New South Wales. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant properties. Ctenopteris burbidgei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use as a medicinal plant requires further research and verification.
